summary: Iteration 62 - Carbon Premiums Super Admin Workflow. All 13 backend tests passed (1 skipped - no pending requests to test reject). Frontend Carbon Premiums Management page fully functional with stats cards, financial summary, request list with filter, expand/collapse details, and parcel table. Orange Money payments are MOCKED.

issues: Minor HTML warning: <span> inside <tbody> - React hydration warning in console, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/stats returns demandes_en_attente, demandes_approuvees, demandes_payees, demandes_rejetees, total_paye_planteurs, total_paye_cooperatives, total_distribue
GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests supports ?status= filter (pending, approved, paid, rejected)
GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests/{id} returns full detail including parcels array with village, area_hectares, carbon_score, prime
PUT /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests/{id}/validate accepts action=approve|reject with optional rejection_reason
PUT /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests/{id}/pay executes MOCKED Orange Money payment, returns transaction_id
POST /api/ussd/callback with text=2*1 triggers create_ussd_payment_request for farmer
Frontend CarbonPremiumsManagement.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Admin Dashboard has 'Primes Carbone' quick access button with data-testid='carbon-premiums-btn'
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested with existing payment requests (2 paid requests for farmer 'Public Test').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon Premiums Super Admin workflow fully implemented. Stats show 2 paid requests totaling 225,000 XOF (202,500 to farmers, 22,500 to coops). USSD payment request via text=2*1 works but test farmer already has paid request so returns 'deja une demande'. To test new requests, use a different farmer or reset existing request status. Orange Money payments are MOCKED - logs show [MOCK] Orange Money payment.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed

carbon_premiums_requests.GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests: PASS - Returns total and requests array
carbon_premiums_requests.GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests/: PASS - Returns full detail with parcels

carbon_premiums_page.page_subtitle: PASS - 'Validation et paiement des primes aux planteurs'
carbon_premiums_page.stats_grid: PASS - Shows En attente, Approuvees, Payees, Rejetees cards
carbon_premiums_page.financial_summary: PASS - Shows Total distribue, Paye aux planteurs, Commissions cooperatives
carbon_premiums_page.filter_dropdown: PASS - 5 options (Toutes, En attente, Approuvees, Payees, Rejetees)
carbon_premiums_page.request_list: PASS - Shows farmer name, phone, coop, parcels count, score, amounts
carbon_premiums_page.expand_collapse: PASS - Click row expands/collapses detail section
carbon_premiums_page.parcel_table: PASS - Shows Village, Surface (ha), Score, Prime columns
